globalRule.description: Records where Plan_ID or Plan_Name is missing, but a positive Monthly_Charge is present for the subscriber.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.Telecom_Dataset_500Rows` WHERE (Plan_ID IS NULL OR Plan_Name IS NULL) AND Monthly_Charge > 0 AND Subscriber_ID IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Records where the Mobile_Number does not consist of exactly 10 digits, despite having a valid Subscriber_ID and Activation_Date.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.Telecom_Dataset_500Rows` WHERE LENGTH(CAST(Mobile_Number AS STRING)) != 10 AND Subscriber_ID IS NOT NULL AND Activation_Date IS NOT NULL
